title: Duplicate Calendar items
excerpt:
Hello! I am new to monday. 
I was wondering if it is posible to dublicate items in the calendar? 
So that you can schedule project 01 on monday, Project 02 on Tuesday and then project 01 on wednesday again.

posts.author: Jbmms (Job)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I am new to monday.
I was wondering if it is posible to dublicate items in the calendar?
So that you can schedule project 01 on monday, Project 02 on Tuesday and then project 01 on wednesday again.
